Video.summary: South African-born Shameen learns about her heritage, which includes traces of Filipino roots; chef Mila shows her Filipino cooking techniques and tools to create her own meal.
Video.title: Meet Shameen Miller

Video.summary: Andrea gets her DNA test results and learns about her heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Andrea Titus

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows that seafood may be great on its own, but when bringing different kinds together - it makes for some great eating.
Video.title: Mixed

Video.summary: Using cream, sunflower oil and cherry tomatoes from the market, Amanda makes a pasta recipe and an indulgent dessert.
Video.title: Cream, Sunflower Oil & Cherry Tomatoes

Video.summary: Amanda makes burgers and fries using ingredients from the market.
Video.title: Beans, Raspberry Jam & Relish

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.
Video.title: Butter

Video.summary: Spencer offers tips and tricks on preparing four different cuts of lamb.
Video.title: Lamb Four Ways

Video.summary: Tyrone reveals Laird's DNA test results and explores his heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Laird Hercules

Video.summary: Discovering local produce and artisanal products at farmers' markets, while learning more about the people who harvest the ingredients; cooking up fresh food recipes in a cozy outdoor kitchen.
Video.title: Honey, Cherries, Garlic Scapes & Carrots

Video.summary: Amanda creates two summer fresh salads and a hearty breakfast using sprouts, potatoes and leafy lambs quarters.
Video.title: Sprouts, Veggies & Potatoes

Video.summary: Amanda prepares three summer dishes using raspberries, mint, peas, and apricots.
Video.title: Raspberries, Mint, Peas & Apricot

Video.summary: Amanda prepares a meal with fresh kale, fennel and red cabbage.
Video.title: Kohlrabi, Fennel, Kale & Red Cabbage

Video.summary: Spencer demonstrates the best ways to grill duck, turkey, capon, and quail.
Video.title: Foul Play

Video.summary: Spencer creates four chicken recipes.
Video.title: Grilled, Roasted & Charred Chicken

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: flavored oils.
Video.title: Oil

Video.summary: Spencer grills some sides and treats for barbeques.
Video.title: Sides & Sweets With Heat

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts adds bread and pastry to Canadian cod and squid.
Video.title: Breaded

Video.summary: Spencer Watts shows how to enjoy fish served cold with arctic char pate & tequila shrimp ceviche.
Video.title: Cold

Video.summary: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts brings the party with mojito marinated mahi mahi, cosmo crab hush puppies and coconut, rum and pineapple king crab.
Video.title: Cocktails

Video.summary: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts showcases the perfect pairing of vinegar and fish with balsamic marinated walleye, gastrique lobster and crawfish popcorn.
Video.title: Vinegar

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts gets saucy with seafood, making a mascarpone sauce and crab sauce for salmon and orange aioli and clarified butter for crab.
Video.title: Saucy

Video.summary: Jessica prepares some treats using autumn-inspired ingredients.
Video.title: Fall

Video.summary: Jessica bakes desserts inspired by the colors and flavors of spring.
Video.title: Spring

Video.summary: Jessica whips up some sweet treats for a summer pool party or just being outdoors.
Video.title: Summer

Video.summary: Jessica uses some surprising ingredients to prepare three desserts.
Video.title: Surprise Ingredients

Video.summary: Jessica makes classic French desserts.
Video.title: Paris

Video.summary: Jessica makes some winter treats, including a Gingerbread chalet.
Video.title: Winter

Video.summary: Jessica shares how to make breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.
Video.title: Saturday Morning Breakfast

Video.summary: Jessica makes fair-inspired desserts, including classic funnel cake.
Video.title: Country Fair

Video.summary: Inspired by flaky, buttery and chocolaty dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la.
Video.title: French Brunch

Video.summary: Chef Craig Wong combines the cuisines of Vietnam and France to create delicious dishes.
Video.title: France + Vietnam

Video.summary: Four chefs turn a French classic on its head.
Video.title: Cassoulet

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by France, French fennel soup; Japan, Unagi-style soy glazed figs; Morocco, Moroccan butter bean tagine; Mexico, asparagus ceviche.
Video.title: France, Japan, Morocco, Mexico

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Cook the Books
